message:
test(demo-showcase): add layout lab snapshot tests

New snapshot tests covering layout lab scenarios:
- alignment_center, alignment_spacebetween
- combined_state
- debug_overlay
- direction_horizontal
- preset_grid, preset_nested, preset_realworld
- with_gap, with_margin
